name: FabricCatalystCustomDeploy
description: Deploys Microsoft Fabric items by copying from a template workspace. Handles tiered deployment of Lakehouses, Warehouses, Notebooks, Semantic Models, Data Pipelines and Reports without Git integration.
author: TechTacoFriday

inputs.name: azureSubscription
inputs.label: Azure Subscription
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure service connection used to obtain tokens for the Fabric, Azure DevOps and Microsoft Graph APIs.

inputs.name: workspacePrefix
inputs.label: Workspace Prefix
inputs.helpMarkDown: Prefix for target Fabric workspaces. The environment code is appended automatically.

inputs.name: capacityName
inputs.label: Capacity Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Display name of the active Fabric capacity to assign workspaces to.

inputs.name: environmentList
inputs.label: Environments
inputs.helpMarkDown: JSON array of environments. Each entry requires 'code' and 'gitEnabled' (always 0 for custom deployment).

inputs.name: sourceWorkspaceName
inputs.label: Source Workspace Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the template workspace to copy Fabric items from.

inputs.name: domainName
inputs.label: Domain Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fabric domain to assign the deployed workspaces to. Leave empty to skip.

inputs.name: subDomainName
inputs.label: Sub-Domain Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fabric sub-domain. Only used when Domain Name is provided.

inputs.name: workspaceAdminsList
inputs.label: Workspace Administrators
inputs.helpMarkDown: Semicolon-separated list of UPNs to assign as Workspace Admin.

inputs.name: organizationName
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Organization
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps organization name (the part after dev.azure.com/).

inputs.name: projectName
inputs.label: Azure DevOps Project
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure DevOps project containing the deployment configuration.

inputs.name: repositoryName
inputs.label: Repository Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Repository that holds the deployment configuration.

inputs.name: sourceBranchName
inputs.label: Source Branch
inputs.helpMarkDown: Branch from which to read deployment configuration.

inputs.name: dataProduct
inputs.label: Data Product
inputs.helpMarkDown: Data product name used to locate the deployment configuration folder.

inputs.name: deploymentDirectoryPath
inputs.label: Deployment Directory Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path in the repository to the root of the deployment configuration folder.

inputs.name: fabricItemsLocation
inputs.label: Fabric Items Location
inputs.helpMarkDown: Source location for Fabric item definition files.

inputs.name: updateDefinition
inputs.label: Update Item Definitions
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, pushes the latest item definitions to the deployed workspace.

inputs.name: enableDiagnostics
inputs.label: Enable Diagnostics
inputs.helpMarkDown: Outputs detailed diagnostic messages to the pipeline log.
